channel.title: Colab on Ronak Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Colab on Ronak Portfolio

item.title: Kaggle Connectivity to Colab
item.description: In this article I will show steps to load kaggle dataset directly to google colab. Prerequisite Colab Kaggle Dataset Steps 1. Choose Dataset Select the dataset to load into colab. I will be using Reviews for Hotels Worldwide (Booking.com) 2. API Token You need authentication from kaggle services to download dataset. Now, you need to download API token. This token can be easily generated from the profile section of your Kaggle account.
